examples:
Command Example
!vt-private-get-file-report resource=2d8bb37078ff9efd02d9361975c9e625ae56bd8a8a65d50fc568341bc88392ae allInfo=true longFormat=true
Context Example
{
"MD5": "fedeb68e5bc9a1627b32504da4d7475a",
"Malicious": {
"Detections": 58,
"TotalEngines": 68,
name: vt-private-get-file-report

outputs.description: File's SHA256 File.Malicious.Vendor For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: For malicious files. Total detections. File.Malicious.TotalEngines For malicious files. Total engines
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Detections

outputs.description: The indicator we tested DBotScore.Type The type of the indicator
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: Scan vendor for this hash File.VirusTotal.Scans.Detected Scan detection for this hash (True,False)
outputs.name: File.VirusTotal.Scans.Source

outputs.description: Scan result for this hash - signature, etc.
outputs.name: File.VirusTotal.Scans.Result
